message:
bd-3bxhj.6.1: OpenTUI reference execution harness for baseline behavior capture

FixtureRunner trait with HarnessConfig builder, scripted event injection
(key press, text input, mouse, resize, snapshots), and deterministic
baseline capture (CapturedFrame, StateTrace, InteractionResponse).

Differential comparison via compare_baselines() with frame-level and
state-level diff tracking and fingerprint matching.

18 unit tests covering config, events, harness runs, determinism,
differential comparison, serialization, and env var redaction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
